title: Deep Learning with Python
subtitle: Hands-On Deep Learning with Keras and TensorFlow
author: Francois Chollet
themes: Practical deep learning using the Keras library
Learning by doing with hands-on code examples
Applying deep learning to vision, text, and sequence data
Building generative models including image generation and text generation
awards: Over 100,000 copies sold across all editions
One of the best-selling deep learning books worldwide
Recommended by Kaggle founder Anthony Goldbloom
excerpt: Deep Learning with Python, written by Keras creator Francois Chollet, is the most accessible and practical introduction to deep learning available. Through intuitive explanations and hands-on examples, you will learn to build, train, and deploy neural networks for computer vision, NLP, and generative applications.
